Description: Inline tray, preview flow, and gift rendering in chat.
DB-backed catalog and wallet/send APIs with safe behavior.
Daily streak and session activity coin earn logic.
Starter packs, bundles, and limited offers.
Abuse controls and event metrics for tuning.

Summary: Show inline rose tray in chat
Description: As a chatting user I can open an inline rose tray above composer.
Acceptance Criteria: Given chat screen when gift button tapped then tray opens; Given tray open when close tapped then tray collapses; Given chat locked then gift control disabled

Summary: Show free/paid cards and wallet balance
Description: As a user I can see gift prices and wallet balance before send.
Acceptance Criteria: Cards show Free or X coins; wallet visible in tray and composer; insufficient funds disables paid gift

Description: As a user I preview gift before confirming send.
Acceptance Criteria: Tap gift opens preview; paid requires confirm; free can send from preview

Summary: Persist gift sends in chat timeline
Description: As users we see sent gifts in chat as gift events.
Acceptance Criteria: Gift appears in message list; bubble renders gif/name/price; text messages unaffected

Description: As client we fetch active gifts from backend catalog.
Acceptance Criteria: Endpoint returns active gifts with price/tier/limited flags; schema supports free+paid; OpenAPI updated

Summary: Create send gift API with atomic wallet debit
Description: As a user sending paid gifts debits wallet safely once.
Acceptance Criteria: Validate participants/match; insufficient balance returns clear error; debit+send consistent; idempotent retry safe

Summary: Add wallet read and controlled top-up API
Description: As a user I can see wallet and receive controlled top-up in MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: Wallet endpoint returns balance; controlled top-up endpoint available; all changes audit logged

Summary: Add gift funnel telemetry and dashboards
Description: As PM/analytics we track gift conversion and economy health.
Acceptance Criteria: Track panel/preview/send/failure events; track coins earned/spent; dashboard includes tier distribution

Summary: Add daily login streak coin rewards
Description: As user I earn streak coins for daily return.
Acceptance Criteria: First login/day grants reward; missed day resets streak; daily cap enforced

Summary: Add active session coin rewards with anti-idle
Description: As active user I earn coins for real activity only.
Acceptance Criteria: Reward requires active interaction; idle/background excluded; cooldown+cap enforced

Summary: Add abuse/fraud safeguards for coin economy
Description: As trust team we detect and control suspicious economy behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: Velocity rules in place; suspicious events alerted; feature-flagged throttling/temporary lock available

Description: As collector users we get rotating limited gifts.
Acceptance Criteria: One weekly limited item active; expired hidden/disabled; schedule configurable

Summary: Run economy simulation for pricing and caps
Description: Simulation validates inflation risk and conversion targets.
Acceptance Criteria: Scenario report produced; recommendation approved by PM/Data

Summary: Prepare rollout plan with feature flags
Description: Controlled rollout strategy for safe launch.
Acceptance Criteria: Flags documented; staged rollout steps approved; rollback path validated
